prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford Coyote 5.0L V8 (Aluminator XS crate engine, code: M-6007-M50XS) with a custom dry-sump oiling system by Aviaid, paired with a Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox for ultra-fast shifts in desert conditions

Forced induction via a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (86mm compressor wheel) with a custom 4.5-inch V-band downpipe and a Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate, tuned on a MoTeC M150 ECU with Dakar-specific fuel maps for extreme heat and altitude compensation

Suspension overhaul with custom-fabricated Fox Racing 2.5 Factory Series DSC coilovers (3.5-inch diameter bodies, 16-inch travel) and a dual-rate spring setup (250 lb/in primary, 400 lb/in secondary) for high-speed desert whoops, paired with a custom-fabricated chromoly tubular subframe by Racer Engineering
estetica: Full carbon fiber bodywork by Composite Motors (Dakar-spec lightweight panels with integrated sand-resistant Kevlar weave), including a custom one-piece front clamshell with integrated LED light bar mounts and a rear diffuser with integrated tow hooks

Custom Dakar-spec livery by RaceArt Graphics featuring a high-visibility orange and black color scheme with reflective 3M Scotchlite accents for night stages, paired with a custom carbon fiber roof scoop for cockpit ventilation and heat extraction

Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light pods (40-inch curved light bar up front, dual 20-inch side pods) mounted on a custom aluminum skid plate with integrated winch mount (Warn Zeon 12-S Platinum) and a rear-facing 10-inch light bar for dust visibility
